creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Add ptpd2_flags="-c /usr/local/etc/ptpd2.conf" into /etc/rc.conf.

If ptpd_enable is set to YES rc will run $command and pass in the values defined in ptpd2_flags. You can find some additional documentation about this @ https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/rc-scripting/article.html#rcng-daemon
